evidence: "It's watchable but sappy.......something to look at when you need a fairy tale like fix."
"Hail Britannia.....an entertaining (and somewhat fanciful) tale that involves the AUTHOR of Sherlock Holmes, Arthur Conan Doyle and his 'Watson' George."
"Four stars plus....all episodes, AFTER the first one, were really great getting better as the story progressed."
"To date I would rate the plot intriguing and the character portrayals very good..Cinematography is excellent and definitely supports the moods intended."
"The balance of the cast was very good and up to their role requirements."
"Character portrayals were spot on and the Hitchcockian introductions to each episode were wonderful!"
"Cinematography is excellent and definitely supports the moods intended."
"The acting is remarkable and the plot follows a realistic path as Mr Selfridge and all the other cast bump and bungle heart warmingly."
"Hard to beat anything with the '24' association.....had already seen it; just loved it again is all."
"Blessedly short in length, marvelously long on scenery both inside and out."
"Cinematography is excellent and definitely supports the moods intended."
"AN AMAZING SERIES WITH A TOTALLY UNEXPECTED ENDING."

summary: The user enjoys drama and fantasy genres, appreciating strong character portrayals and high production quality. They prefer slower-paced narratives that evoke emotional responses, though they show some ambivalence towards specific creators or franchises.
